description: Result payload for gc pack registry search.

schema_version.description: Version of this command result schema.

query.description: Plain text query used to filter pack names and descriptions.

registry.description: Registry name filter when the search was limited to one registry.

refreshed.description: Whether registry refreshes were attempted before searching.

limit.description: Maximum result count applied when all is false.

all.description: Whether the default result limit was disabled.

truncated.description: Whether matching results were truncated by the limit.

items.description: One matching pack entry from a registry catalog.

registry.description: Registry that provided this pack entry.

name.description: Pack name as published in the registry catalog.

description.description: Pack description from the registry catalog.

source_kind.description: Source type for this pack entry.

latest.description: Highest non-withdrawn semver release known for this pack.

failures.description: Registry refresh or cache failures encountered while searching.

items.description: One registry search warning or failure.

name.description: Registry associated with the warning or failure.
